candidate_definition_hints.text: Camoscio: An Italian instruction-tuned language model based on LLaMA

This repository contains code for Camoscio, an Italian instruction-tuned LLaMA based on [Stanford Alpaca](https://github.com/tatsu-lab/stanford_alpaca) and trained with [low-rank adaptation (LoRA)](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2106.09685.pdf). The companion paper of this repo is availa…
